## Meeting Purpose

[Deep dive with Ankit Pahuja, SEO lead at SentinelOne, to understand current SEO initiatives, challenges, and priorities.](https://fathom.video/share/m-eTkQ7wHyzxppSm4wUTyx-XCViya_3W?tab=summary&timestamp=161.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Primary goal: 45% YoY organic traffic growth, with focus on CS101 updates, CVE database project, and localization](https://fathom.video/share/m-eTkQ7wHyzxppSm4wUTyx-XCViya_3W?tab=summary&timestamp=390.0)
  - [LLMs/AI significantly impacting SEO strategy; need for improved visibility and optimization](https://fathom.video/share/m-eTkQ7wHyzxppSm4wUTyx-XCViya_3W?tab=summary&timestamp=422.0)
  - [Team structure decentralized; opportunity for better product marketing integration in content](https://fathom.video/share/m-eTkQ7wHyzxppSm4wUTyx-XCViya_3W?tab=summary&timestamp=1622.0)

## Topics

### Current SEO Landscape Challenges

  - [CS101 directory: Major traffic driver, 900+ pieces across 8 categories](https://fathom.video/share/m-eTkQ7wHyzxppSm4wUTyx-XCViya_3W?tab=summary&timestamp=259.0)
  - [LLM impact: Traffic drop, attribution for LLM visibility](https://fathom.video/share/m-eTkQ7wHyzxppSm4wUTyx-XCViya_3W?tab=summary&timestamp=422.0)
  - [Getting SEO projects approved: e.g. competitor comparison pages](https://fathom.video/share/m-eTkQ7wHyzxppSm4wUTyx-XCViya_3W?tab=summary&timestamp=599.0)
  - [Vulnerability database project in progress](https://fathom.video/share/m-eTkQ7wHyzxppSm4wUTyx-XCViya_3W?tab=summary&timestamp=292.0)
    [stages](https://fathom.video/share/m-eTkQ7wHyzxppSm4wUTyx-XCViya_3W?tab=summary&timestamp=292.0)
  - [International sites moving from subdomains to subdirectories](https://fathom.video/share/m-eTkQ7wHyzxppSm4wUTyx-XCViya_3W?tab=summary&timestamp=1336.0)

### Team Dynamics and Content Creation

  - [No centralized content team; CS101 writer managed by SEO, blog by separate team](https://fathom.video/share/m-eTkQ7wHyzxppSm4wUTyx-XCViya_3W?tab=summary&timestamp=1622.0)
  - [Copywriting for landing pages managed by brand team](https://fathom.video/share/m-eTkQ7wHyzxppSm4wUTyx-XCViya_3W?tab=summary&timestamp=1608.0)
  - [Monthly meetings with VP of Brand to discuss progress and yearly goals](https://fathom.video/share/m-eTkQ7wHyzxppSm4wUTyx-XCViya_3W?tab=summary&timestamp=1970.0)
  - [Opportunity to improve product marketing integration in CS101 content](https://fathom.video/share/m-eTkQ7wHyzxppSm4wUTyx-XCViya_3W?tab=summary&timestamp=1717.0)

### SEO Goals and Metrics

  - [Primary: 45% YoY organic traffic growth](https://fathom.video/share/m-eTkQ7wHyzxppSm4wUTyx-XCViya_3W?tab=summary&timestamp=1390.0)
  - [Secondary: Ranking for top 20 keyword list](https://fathom.video/share/m-eTkQ7wHyzxppSm4wUTyx-XCViya_3W?tab=summary&timestamp=2131.0)
  - [Shifted focus from CTR due to LLM impact](https://fathom.video/share/m-eTkQ7wHyzxppSm4wUTyx-XCViya_3W?tab=summary&timestamp=2156.0)

### Quick Win Opportunities

1.  CS101 updates: Optimize for TOFU terms and LLM visibility
2.  CVE database project: Potential for 5,000,000+ pages
3.  Localization: Translate CS101 to 7 languages

### Ongoing Projects and Priorities

  - [CS101 audit in progress, aiming to complete by mid-August](https://fathom.video/share/m-eTkQ7wHyzxppSm4wUTyx-XCViya_3W?tab=summary&timestamp=1736.0)
  - [Evaluating new tools (e.g. Profound) for LLM/AI optimization](https://fathom.video/share/m-eTkQ7wHyzxppSm4wUTyx-XCViya_3W?tab=summary&timestamp=450.0)
  - [Vulnerability database project in planning stages](https://fathom.video/share/m-eTkQ7wHyzxppSm4wUTyx-XCViya_3W?tab=summary&timestamp=2591.0)
  - [Localization efforts beginning for 7 languages](https://fathom.video/share/m-eTkQ7wHyzxppSm4wUTyx-XCViya_3W?tab=summary&timestamp=2341.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to review shared documents (CVE project plan, top 20 keyword list, monthly reporting slides)](https://fathom.video/share/m-eTkQ7wHyzxppSm4wUTyx-XCViya_3W?tab=summary&timestamp=342.0)
  - [GrowthX to send strategy document by end of week](https://fathom.video/share/m-eTkQ7wHyzxppSm4wUTyx-XCViya_3W?tab=summary&timestamp=669.0)
  - [Prioritize product marketing deep dive to improve content integration](https://fathom.video/share/m-eTkQ7wHyzxppSm4wUTyx-XCViya_3W?tab=summary&timestamp=1717.0)
  - [Explore Scrunch tool implementation for LLM tracking (week 4-5 of engagement)](https://fathom.video/share/m-eTkQ7wHyzxppSm4wUTyx-XCViya_3W?tab=summary&timestamp=494.0)
  - [Continue collaboration on CS101 updates, CVE project, and localization efforts](https://fathom.video/share/m-eTkQ7wHyzxppSm4wUTyx-XCViya_3W?tab=summary&timestamp=2667.0)
